apps.name: Tytus Forge
apps.description: Standalone vscode.dev-style Monaco workbench for local files, markdown preview, and future Tytus agents/Cortex workflows.

apps.name: OpenHouse
apps.description: Visual agent house for Tytus pods and third-party AI agents — rooms, bodies, moods, probes, and safe status diagnostics.

apps.name: Photo Editor
apps.description: Photo editor with crop, rotate, filters, and brightness/contrast adjustments.

apps.name: API Tester
apps.description: Postman-style HTTP request builder with collections, history, and environments.

apps.name: JULI3TA
apps.description: Full AI-native music creator for Tytus OS. Create songs, lyrics, covers, and manage your local music workbench.
